raw_consumer_statement:
They wouldn't help me resolve monthly charges. 
I called them in XXXX, XXXX, XXXX, and XXXX to remind them that I was still getting unauthorized charges but they wouldn't provide any assistance. They were unable to block unauthorized charges from XXXX XXXX XXXX. They were also unwilling to help find charges for anything that was older than XXXX XXXX. This was multiple unauthorized recurring charges that I didn't authorize. I think they the agents I was speaking to stole my card info and sold it. I wasted over XXXX hours with Citibank I had to close the card which hurt my credit score. Citibank also stole my points.
